name: crazy-professor
description: Divergence generator for creative ideation. Four active voices (first-principles-jester, labyrinth-librarian, systems-alchemist, radagast-brown) produce strange but anchored provocations, never advice. Default mode returns 10 provocations; --chat mode runs all four voices and distills 20 ideas; --lab opens a static review browser. Local-only. Phase 4-8 was rolled back in v0.13.0 (see CHANGELOG).
